opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I'm freezing but sweating through my clothes, and it feels like I'm sitting on a hot coal whenever I try to pee.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly overnight — high fevers and shakes, and now it burns terribly to pass water and I can barely get it started.

symptom_narrative.duration: roughly a day and getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: started with a high fever and violent shaking chills; then deep aching pain low down between my legs that spreads to my lower belly and lower back; in the last half-day it burns like fire to pass water
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've had down there — I can hardly sit still and I'm walking hunched over
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: deep behind the base, spreading up to just above the pubic bone and round into my lower back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse, worse when I try to pee or sit down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — a hot pad on the chair takes the edge off a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting down and trying to pass water
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: aching all over, feel wiped out and shivery, going to the toilet far more often and desperate to go but only a little comes out and it's slow to start; the water looks cloudy and smells foul; it hurt when I finished during sex last night
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can still get around but only just, walking bent over because of the pain; live on my own so no one is here to keep an eye on me

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally well, no ongoing conditions that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried there's no one around if he gets worse overnight

objective_data_offered.value: 38.9 degrees on our home thermometer a little while ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home digital thermometer, technique and calibration unknown

objective_data_offered.value: my watch says my heart rate is around 105
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer wearable, not a clinical monitor

objective_data_offered.value: I keep going hot and cold and shaking uncontrollably, drenched in sweat
the urine looks cloudy and smells really bad, and only a small amount comes out even though I'm desperate to go
